prompt: Change the image into a 90s Y2K Tamagotchi LCD screen style. Keep the original characters and situation, but reinterpret and simplify them into cute and insignificant 8-bit pixel characters and backgrounds. Use a bright and lovely pastel LCD palette (centered on cream, pink, mint, and lavender), dot matrix texture, large pixels, 4-color limit, and flat LCD expression. Include retro UI such as battery icons, status windows, menu icons, hearts, levels, date/time, and short pixel text. Do not show the Tamagotchi device body, buttons, bezel, or frame. Create a nostalgic and lovely Tamagotchi pixel screen that fills only the inside of the LCD. Sharp focus. 8k.
